Two apple trees twisted around each other. One crab and the other full-size. Full-size apples are green and a lot like a Granny Smith. I have picked there for some time, but no idea if it's allowed or not. Forage with care. 2018 there is no fruit on the full-s
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

A line of trees along the sidewalk on the 25th st. side. Seem to be mostly for landscaping purposes. I doubt the school cares if you pick any fruit. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
